templates.boom_copy: Esports finals blow up the district — foot traffic and rent surge.
templates.bust_copy: Sponsor scandal tanks the esports scene — tenants flee the district.

templates.boom_copy: A major streamer HQ opens nearby — property values rocket.
templates.bust_copy: The streamer lays off their whole studio — leases break.

templates.boom_copy: New subway line connects the district — values jump.
templates.bust_copy: Construction delays paralyze the district — foot traffic collapses.

templates.boom_copy: Retro arcade chain picks the district — rent climbs.
templates.bust_copy: Retro fad fizzles — arcade chain pulls out overnight.

templates.boom_copy: VC money floods into the district — values surge.
templates.bust_copy: Startup bubble pops — tech tenants default on rent.

templates.boom_copy: Fed slashes rates — mortgage demand spikes, values climb.
templates.bust_copy: Fed hikes rates — lending dries up, values drop.

templates.boom_copy: Celebrity restaurant puts the district on the map.
templates.bust_copy: Celebrity restaurant fails food inspection — district takes the hit.
